channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Rumors emerge of a CLARITY Act deal between White House and lawmakers
item.description: The deal reportedly focuses on stablecoin yield and interest-bearing stable tokens, a major pain point for the banking industry.

item.title: Bitcoin price aims to hold $70K amid rising inflation concerns
item.description: Bitcoin searches for equilibrium at $70,000 while rising crude oil prices and tanking stock markets have investors worried over the future of inflation in the US.

item.title: Bitcoin Has Stabilized, But Investors Are Paying Up for Downside Protection: VanEck
item.description: Bitcoin's volatility has subsided over the last month, but traders are still paying a premium for downside protection, VanEck said.

item.title: Man Pleads Guilty to Using AI to Generate $8 Million in Fraudulent Streaming Music Royalties
item.description: Prosecutors say automated plays of AI-generated songs fraudulently diverted royalties from human artists—to the tune of $8 million.

item.title: Nevada Becomes First State to Ban Prediction Market Kalshi—At Least for Now
item.description: Kalshi's sports, politics, and entertainment prediction markets will be banned in Nevada for at least the next 14 days.

item.title: Google Threat Intel flags 'Ghostblade' crypto-stealing malware
item.description: Ghostblade is one of six malware tools in the "DarkSword" suite of malicious software designed to steal crypto private keys and user data.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried's past political cash gives AI PAC fuel for bashing NY candidate Bores
item.description: A mailer from Think Big PAC told voters that the Democratic U.S. House candidate once got $100,000 in support from the former head of failed global exchange FTX.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Institutions aren’t waiting for the bottom
item.description: Nearly three-quarters of institutional investors plan to increase their digital asset allocations this year, with Bitcoin, Ether, stablecoins and tokenized assets seeing the most interest.

item.title: Ledger hires ex-Circle exec as CFO, opens NYC office to expand US business
item.description: Ledger names John Andrews as chief financial officer and opens a New York office to expand its US operations and institutional business.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Senators say they've reached compromise on yield to advance crypto market bill
item.description: One of the major sticking points on the crypto market structure bill may be resolved, at least enough to move toward a Senate hearing to advance the bill.

item.title: OpenAI Plans to Merge ChatGPT, Codex and Atlas Into One 'Superapp': WSJ
item.description: OpenAI will consolidate its fragmented desktop products into a single superapp, a report claims, as rival Anthropic gains momentum.

item.title: Bitcoin is a check and balance on inflation. When spending gets too far out of hand, capital moves to Bitcoin. Competition benefits customers, and this applies even in the market for money. In this way, Bitcoin will help preserve dollar dominance. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE4xRTZtSjhIMW5jLVl1cnhTdndYQ2lWTDJ3NXFyWHNfQkRZc0NGOS00QnF4aXZOcVZVbUdHLVFybDlMSTFBMFZQVThyNWhCeGJsYWVocFJaeXJRd29jSFR1TVQ0UU9LbmM?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin is a check and bala…

item.title: Kalshi gets temporary Nevada ban in dispute over sports betting
item.description: A Nevada court issued a 14-day ban on a wide range of contracts from prediction market firm Kalshi as the firm continues battling with state regulators.

item.title: Ether taker volume hits 3-year high: Will ETH avoid a 19% price decline?
item.description: A strong buy signal not seen since 2022 just flashed on Ether, but the altcoin needs to hold above a key price level to avoid invalidating the pattern.

item.title: Kalshi Raises $1 Billion to Double Valuation to $22 Billion: Reports
item.description: Kalshi has raised $1 billion at a $22 billion valuation, doubling its worth in just three months.

item.title: SEC's new interpretive guidance released this week, categorizing crypto assets into 5 distinct groups. Non-security crypto asset examples from the SEC included: $APT $AVAX $BTC $BCH $ADA $LINK $DOGE $ETH $HBAR $LTC $DOT $SHIB $SOL $XLM $ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5aV2VRR1RFOEtmQWNKa3dhY1pPd3BCOWJjREVodGRQUGk3Mm5FSE5WNWRlVWxRSjYyV2ZGR1U3RHg5X2MzclNuSjhoQXFlS2FsRTlNZEZYcU1jOUw5ZmdR?oc=5" target="_blank">SEC's new interpretive guidance releas…

item.title: White House AI Proposal Seeks to Override State Laws, Avoid New Regulator
item.description: The Trump administration's framework outlines a national approach to AI policy, from child safety to data centers.

item.title: Eightco Boosts OpenAI Investment After BitMine's Tom Lee Joins Board
item.description: Publicly traded blockchain and AI firm Eightco upped its investment in the private firm behind ChatGPT, OpenAI.

item.title: Traders pricing in TACO trade may be in for 'rude awakening' — Analyst
item.description: The disruption to the oil market and critical energy effects may have long-term economic effects that investors are not pricing in.

item.title: Gemini Faces Class-Action Suit Over Prediction Market Pivot, Plummeting Stock Price
item.description: Shareholders claim the Winklevoss twins failed to disclose plans to shift Gemini’s focus, and overstated the viability of its ambitions.

item.title: Historic day for Polkadot. In its new crypto assets interpretation (Rel. Nos. 33‑11412 / 34‑105020), the SEC classifies DOT as a “digital commodity” and, under that framework, does not treat DOT itself as a security under the federal securities laws. DOT now app - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1zNENuUDh3RUlXajNVbFVQWktSUWdSWjc0YXd4WHpoTUU3M3NnS0t3enp4MFRVa0JvYVNVNWkyR2FCYU04NkxuRTl4ckNCVnFIMjZNUUNCRVVKMEM4X1E?oc=5" target="_blank">Historic day for Polkadot. In its new c…

item.title: White House outlines national AI framework, calls for unified federal approach
item.description: The legislative recommendations highlight six policy areas, including copyright, energy and workforce development, while signaling a lighter regulatory stance.

item.title: Nasdaq winning SEC approval to move stocks onchain shows how Wall Street is taking charge of crypto tech
item.description: Nasdaq's structure the SEC approved opens door to bring blockchain benefits to equities, while preserving the same-old intermediaries and market structure, industry insiders say.

item.title: What Happens to Bitcoin if Bank of America's 'Three Conditions' for Fed Rate Hikes Hit?
item.description: Analysts acknowledged that Bitcoin would likely face pressure if the Fed hikes rates, but they highlighted the asset’s recent resilience.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC Chair Mike Selig says crypto will power the "new frontier of finance" as markets "move on chain." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1PYXpYTGNnQktBUVZiRHFjbTBsYnNONDJuTHVJeHRrNnZxTWlpWlFVTmd3bExhcFM3RC12RzFCNzhrelNtdERrRTBQeXNMdmF2OVVRSFk0Q1VtWDlMTjFOSkhB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC Chair Mike Seli…

item.title: Market analyst sees further Bitcoin downside, flags $60K as key level
item.description: In the latest Cointelegraph interview, professional trader Alessio Rastani warns that Bitcoin could fall below $60,000 before a meaningful bottom forms.

item.title: What happens to Bitcoin if oil price hits $180 per barrel?
item.description: A 70% oil spike could nearly double US inflation, slash rate-cut hopes, and deepen downside risks for Bitcoin prices in the coming months.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Wealth Management oversees about $8 trillion in AUM and recommends 0–4% bitcoin allocation. A 2% allocation would represent $160 billion, ~3X the size of IBIT. $MSBT: Monster Bitcoin. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9fTUdsRHlwUGV4WHJfLTBIVFN3dDhLMFhqWktwQ2s5VGZpZHNteDdVTkEzRlo0OS0tMGtkdmp3RFE0MXd0VU4yQV9fTXRvdUdiSmNSWHVUNVZvTzRL?oc=5" target="_blank">Morgan Stanley Wealth Management oversees …

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC announces Futures Commission Merchants can accept Bitcoin as margin collateral. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5XVVctRmpETk15R0RFbXhBLXpPYWljVU04X0hSUTQwM0luaGxRRHhtSU85allkSExEOGF3ZGdrUl9hclN1LXExaVB0ZzhqSS1Dd0k1OE9NdjE3QXNNaXd6LU1aR2pkdVU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC announce…

item.title: Bitcoin's latest fear unlocked as rate hike bets rise and bond markets crumble
item.description: For now, surging oil prices and persistent geopolitical tensions are driving inflation fears and weakening traditional safe-haven assets.

item.title: Why CoinDesk PitchFest matters heading into Miami
item.description: Lin examines the role of the Consensus event in providing founders with structured access to the sector’s most influential decision-makers.

item.title: 🩸CRASH: $600,000,000,000 has been wiped out of the US stock market in just 50 MINUTES. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5kYl9la2VuT3pzbU8yR0JlRzF4RjdNbFNoM0FmMTFmMnk0Ym1HQjRBb2wxZDVUUTFMZnViQ0JQMVU1b2ttMlR0UU9XazNET21IUzFXTWZ0c2pNUUV0QlJwX1hn?oc=5" target="_blank">🩸CRASH: $600,000,000,000 has been…

item.title: BitFuFu cuts self-mined Bitcoin in 2025, shifts focus to cloud mining
item.description: Bitcoin miner BitFuFu decreased its revenue from self-hosted mining operations by 60% in 2025 in a push to cloud mining.

item.title: Crypto wallet maker Ledger taps former Circle exec as CFO to help lead IPO push
item.description: The crypto security firm is expanding its U.S. footprint and strengthening its leadership team as it prepares for a potential public listing.

item.title: Crypto part of Canada’s ‘core’ financial system, but risk concerns remain
item.description: The crypto industry has seen a number of regulatory changes over the past year, with the Canadian government taking a risk-management, rules-first approach.

item.title: Bitcoin RSI signals potential bottom as analysts flag key setup
item.description: Bitcoin’s RSI is nearing a key level, with analysts saying a higher low is needed to support a potential continuation in BTC price.

item.title: Bitcoin whale holding $147M wakes after 13 years, makes tiny $56 transfer
item.description: A Bitcoin wallet inactive since 2012 has moved $56 worth of BTC, spotlighting a stash now valued at roughly $147 million after more than 13 years dormant.

item.title: Kalshi valuation doubles to $22 billion in latest funding round: Bloomberg
item.description: The new $1 billion investment round indicates that interest in the embattled prediction market remains.

item.title: Altcoin Volume Slumps 80% Amid ‘Tighter’ Monetary Conditions
item.description: A changing investor landscape and Bitcoin’s failed breakout attempt led to an 80% drop in altcoin trading volume from October.

item.title: Stablecoin issuers and fintechs race to own payment rails
item.description: Leading crypto and fintech companies are competing to capture growing revenue from stablecoin payments by launching their own settlement infrastructure.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aptos (APT) gains 6.3% as index rises
item.description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 2.5% from Thursday, joined Aptos (APT) as a top performer.

item.title: Coinbase introduces stock perpetual futures contracts for non-U.S. customers
item.description: The contracts trade 24/7, are cash-settled in USDC and allow for up to 10-times leverage on single-stock contracts and 20-times on ETF products.

item.title: Iran war volatility is driving oil trading boom on Hyperliquid, says JPMorgan
item.description: Round-the-clock oil trading on Hyperliquid is drawing investors beyond crypto as geopolitical shocks expose gaps in traditional markets, the bank said.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Rebounds as Oil Falls
item.description: Crypto bounced as traders bet the Iran war may end sooner than feared, while prediction markets just had a blockbuster day.

item.title: Morgan Stanley files amended S-1 for MSBT Bitcoin ETF
item.description: The proposed spot Bitcoin ETF outlines seed capital, listing plans and trading partners in its latest filing as it moves closer to a potential market debut.

item.title: Coinbase launches 24/7 stock perps for non-US traders
item.description: Coinbase has launched stock perpetual futures for non-US traders, expanding its push to offer round-the-clock access to multiple asset classes.

item.title: Bitcoin holds steady, with one analyst seeing the upside emerging
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 20, 2026

item.title: Apple iOS Malware Targets Crypto Apps on Unpatched iPhones: Google
item.description: The DarkSword exploit chain affects older versions of iOS 18, delivering malware that specifically hunts for exchange and wallet apps.

item.title: Also, gaming on a blockchain is not coming back - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1oWE5SUUtSRHhZcEJqWXlzN2x4RHJZUlpWa0UwZHVsaGpybW1lckhPSkU1S2t6TVNmcVk2RmlXb1ZOWEduYWZpVHlCLS01alFiQ01hMmRDVGpBVExGejJJ?oc=5" target="_blank">Also, gaming on a blockchain is not co…

item.title: Ripple survey finds 72% of finance leaders see digital assets as essential
item.description: Stablecoins and custody lead adoption priorities, with firms focusing on how to build or source digital asset infrastructure.

item.title: Crypto market steadies as derivatives signal caution, macro pressure builds
item.description: BTC holds near $70,500 as derivatives turn defensive, macro risks weigh on sentiment and altcoins show pockets of strength.

item.title: South Korea tax agency seeks private crypto custodian after security lapses
item.description: South Korea’s tax agency is seeking a private custodian for seized crypto after a wallet seed phrase leak exposed government-held assets.

item.title: Bitcoin Rallies to $71K as Bessent Mulls Lifting Some Iran Oil Sanctions
item.description: Bitcoin bounced Friday as U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent outlined possible responses to soaring oil prices.

item.title: Ripple data reveals stablecoins are becoming the go-to tool for corporate treasury
item.description: A new Ripple survey of more than 1,000 global finance leaders finds that digital assets are now seen as a strategic necessity rather than an optional experiment.

item.title: Bitcoin’s price action looks dangerously similar to the pattern that sent it crashing to $60,000
item.description: The recent price action echoes the November–January pattern, showing weak conviction among the “buy the dip” crowd.

item.title: Bitcoin jumps to $70,800 as oil retreats; ether and XRP lag
item.description: Oil prices slipped as major economies announced joint efforts to stabilize energy markets.

item.title: Morgan Stanley sets MSBT ticker and $1 million seed capital for bitcoin ETF
item.description: Morgan Stanley has filed to launch a spot Bitcoin ETF with the ticker MSBT and a $1 million seed at debut.

item.title: Kentucky Senate Urged to Strip Hardware Wallet Provision From Crypto Bill
item.description: A crypto kiosk bill in Kentucky includes language that could effectively outlaw self-custody, drawing industry backlash.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: An oil tanker operator reportedly paid Iran a $2 million fee for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday. Iran is now charging select countries millions per tanker for safe transit through the strait. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBkT0FORGROUngxbXJKUW8wVUp2eV94c1BPN3VVVVNPSHBNU0p1UHdJR0ZEM2RhQlVWZi14SHQxaE9IWm1fTjFEbldzM0xXWVVnbGhhS1I1Ymk1aWQ1QlB0OUtR?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: An oil tanker operator…
